div.head: 299. Memorandum of a Telephone Conversation Between the Secretary of State and the Director of Central Intelligence (McCone)Source: Department of State, Rusk Files: Lot 72 D 192, Telephone Conversations. No classification marking. Transcribed by Proctor.
div.p:
Sec said his secure phone was not buttoned up and he would have to talk to M on this one. M said he had gone into the question of the use of some of the sensitive information to prove the night attack
and disprove Hanoi’s allegation that it did not take place; it just cannot be used; we will have to have eyewitness accounts and things of that kind.
